qEnglish: Which sentence is related to the impersonal voice (Bhavvachya)?
optionsEnglish: The book was read by me.
The soldier was made the chief.
explanationEnglish: 'Baitha jayega' focuses on the action/feeling and uses an intransitive verb in the passive structure, typical of Bhavvachya.
explanationHindi: 'बैठा जायेगा' अकर्मक क्रिया का वाच्य है जहाँ क्रिया की प्रधानता है।
subject: Hindi

qEnglish: In which option is there NO passive voice (Karmvachya)?
qHindi: किस विकल्प में कर्मवाच्य नहीं है ?
optionsHindi: मेरे द्वारा व्यायाम किया जाता है।
explanationEnglish: 'Rani ne saheliyon ko bulaya' is in the active voice (Kartrivachya).
explanationHindi: 'रानी ने सहेलियों को बुलाया' कर्तृवाच्य का उदाहरण है।
subject: Hindi
